new_terms.context: Groq re-organized the architecture into groups of single-purpose units... named the groups 'slices'.
Groq opted for single-level scratchpad SRAM instead of multi-level memory hierarchy to make the hardware execution deterministic.
Conceptually, LPU resembles a systolic array that pumps instructions vertically and data horizontally.

new_terms.suggested_translation: VXM / MEM / SXM / MXM 切片
new_terms.context: LPU architecture has VXM slices for vector operations, MEM slices for loading/storing data, etc.
This was a much more mature node compared to peers when it taped out in 2020.
Marvell responsible for the chip’s physical design.
The C2C SerDes on the chip couldn’t hit the advertised 112G speed.
The data flow and instruction flow design requires fine-grained pipelining to achieve high performance.
